US-1.1-01-dashboard-loaded.png.expected: The dashboard loads with the page title 'Tableau de Bord'

US-1.1-02-stat-cards-visible.png.expected: 4 counters are visible: Chercheurs, Themes, Clusters, and Publications

US-1.1-03-stat-values.png.expected: Every counter shows a numeric value greater than zero with a label

US-1.1-05-back-to-dashboard.png.expected: The dashboard reloads with all counters visible

US-1.1-E1-01-intercept-set.png.action: When the server is temporarily unavailable
US-1.1-E1-01-intercept-set.png.expected: The dashboard begins to load while the server cannot be reached

US-1.1-E1-02-dashboard-loading.png.action: The dashboard loads while the server is unavailable
US-1.1-E1-02-dashboard-loading.png.expected: The page structure appears even though data cannot be fetched

US-1.1-E1-03-error-state.png.action: The dashboard handles the outage gracefully
US-1.1-E1-03-error-state.png.expected: The statistics area shows an error state instead of numbers

US-1.1-E1-04-retry-visible.png.expected: A 'Reessayer' button is visible so the user can try again

US-1.1-E2-01-intercept-zeros.png.action: When the database is empty (no data yet)
US-1.1-E2-01-intercept-zeros.png.expected: The server responds with zero counts for all categories

US-1.1-E2-02-dashboard-loaded.png.action: The dashboard loads with empty data
US-1.1-E2-02-dashboard-loaded.png.expected: The page loads successfully even with no records in the database

US-1.1-E2-03-zero-stats.png.expected: Each of the 4 stat counters displays '0'

US-1.1-E2-04-empty-message.png.action: An informative message explains there's no data
US-1.1-E2-04-empty-message.png.expected: A message such as 'Aucune donnee disponible' is shown to the user

US-1.1-E3-01-intercept-large.png.action: When the database contains a large volume of data
US-1.1-E3-01-intercept-large.png.expected: The server responds with very high counts (e.g. 100,000 researchers)

US-1.1-E3-02-dashboard-loaded.png.action: The dashboard loads with large data
US-1.1-E3-02-dashboard-loaded.png.expected: The page loads successfully with large numbers

US-1.1-E3-03-formatted-numbers.png.action: Large numbers are formatted for readability
US-1.1-E3-03-formatted-numbers.png.expected: Numbers use thousands separators (e.g. '100 000' instead of '100000')

US-1.2-01-dashboard-loaded.png.expected: The dashboard loads with the page title 'Tableau de Bord'

US-1.2-02-activity-section.png.expected: The 'Activite Recente' section is visible with activity items below it

US-1.2-03-activity-items.png.action: Up to 5 recent activities are displayed
US-1.2-03-activity-items.png.expected: Each activity shows an avatar, a name, an action description, and a timestamp

US-1.2-04-sort-order.png.action: Activities are ordered by most recent first
US-1.2-04-sort-order.png.expected: The first activity item has the most recent timestamp

US-1.2-E1-01-intercept-empty.png.expected: The server returns an empty activity list

US-1.2-E1-03-empty-state.png.action: A message explains there's no activity yet
US-1.2-E1-03-empty-state.png.expected: 'Aucune activite recente' is displayed in place of the activity list

US-1.2-E2-01-intercept-error.png.action: When the activity service encounters an error
US-1.2-E2-01-intercept-error.png.expected: The server returns a failure response for the activity feed

US-1.2-E2-02-dashboard-loaded.png.expected: The page loads successfully while the activity section handles the error

US-1.2-E2-03-error-retry.png.action: An error message with retry option is shown
US-1.2-E2-03-error-retry.png.expected: The activity section shows an error message and a 'Reessayer' button

US-1.2-E3-01-intercept-deleted.png.action: When a referenced researcher has been removed
US-1.2-E3-01-intercept-deleted.png.expected: The server returns an activity linked to a researcher who no longer exists

US-1.2-E3-03-deleted-name.png.action: The removed researcher's name is shown but not clickable
US-1.2-E3-03-deleted-name.png.expected: The name appears grayed out with '(profil supprime)' and has no link to a profile

US-1.3-01-dashboard-loaded.png.expected: The dashboard loads with the page title 'Tableau de Bord'

US-1.3-02-mini-map-visible.png.expected: A miniature map preview of research clusters is visible with the hint 'Cliquer pour ouvrir la carte complete'

US-1.3-03-hover-effect.png.expected: The cursor changes to a pointer and a blue outline appears around the map preview

US-1.3-04-navigated-to-map.png.action: Click the map preview to open full view
US-1.3-04-navigated-to-map.png.expected: The full thematic map page opens

US-1.3-E1-01-intercept-empty.png.action: When no research clusters exist yet
US-1.3-E1-01-intercept-empty.png.expected: The server returns an empty list of clusters

US-1.3-E1-03-placeholder.png.action: A placeholder explains the map is not available
US-1.3-E1-03-placeholder.png.expected: 'Carte non disponible' is shown in place of the map preview

US-1.3-E2-01-intercept-slow.png.action: When the map data is loading slowly
US-1.3-E2-01-intercept-slow.png.expected: The server is taking longer than expected to respond

US-1.3-E2-02-dashboard-loaded.png.expected: The page structure appears while the map data is still being fetched

US-1.3-E2-03-loading-spinner.png.action: A loading indicator is shown while data loads
US-1.3-E2-03-loading-spinner.png.expected: A spinner and 'Chargement...' text appear inside the map preview area

US-1.3-E3-01-intercept-malformed.png.action: When the map data cannot be loaded
US-1.3-E3-01-intercept-malformed.png.expected: The server returns an error response for the cluster data

US-1.3-E3-02-dashboard-loaded.png.expected: The page loads successfully while the map section handles the error

US-1.3-E3-03-fallback.png.action: A fallback message with a link to the full map is shown
US-1.3-E3-03-fallback.png.expected: 'Cliquer pour voir la carte' appears in place of the map preview, and clicking it still opens the full map
